loan_requestment_no.text: เลขที่สัญญา

root.sql:
select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as memname ,pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_live(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as age_life_text ,pka_com_function.fp_form_idcard(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card) as id_card ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.marriage_status ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date, 'DD') as requestment_day ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date, 'MONTH') as requestment_month ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date, 'YYYY') as requestment_year --ที่อยู่ ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, '0') as address_line
,sc_mem_m_member_address.address_no ,sc_mem_m_member_address.moo ,sc_mem_m_member_address.soi ,sc_mem_m_member_address.road ,pka_com_function.fp_get_sub_district_name(sc_mem_m_member_address.tambol) as tambol ,pka_com_function.fp_get_district_name(sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code,sc_mem_m_member_address.district_code) as district_name ,pka_com_function.fp_get_province_name(sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code) as province_name ,sc_mem_m_member_address.postcode ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_tel(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, '0') as telephone
,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type ,sc_mem_m_member_work_info.position_long ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_request_amount ,pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai( sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_request_amount ) as loan_request_amount_thai ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.period_payment_amount ,pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai(sc_lon_m_loan_request.period_payment_amount) as period_payment_amount_thai ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_installment_amount ,pka_lon_intsrv.fp_intrate_table_loantype( sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type , sc_lon_m_loan_request.begining_of_contract ) * 100 as lon_int_rate ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.last_payment_amount ,pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai(sc_lon_m_loan_request.last_payment_amount) as last_payment_amount_thai ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_loan_request.start_keep_date ,'MONTH YYYY') as start_keep_date --วันที่เริ่มงวด ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ,sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.bank_code ,sc_acc_m_ucf_bank.bank_name ,pka_com_function.fp_form(sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.bank_acc_no,'XXX-X-XXXXX-X')as bank_acc_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date ,'DD MONTH YYYY') as requestment_date ,sc_cnt_m_coop.coop_name
/*คนค้ำ*/ ,(select sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_own_no from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.seq_no = '1') as coll_no_1 ,(select sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_own_no from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.seq_no = '2') as coll_no_2 ,(select sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_own_no from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.seq_no = '3') as coll_no_3 ,(select sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_own_no from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.seq_no = '4') as coll_no_4 ,(select sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_own_no from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.seq_no = '5') as coll_no_5
,(select sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_description from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.seq_no = '1') as coll_name_1 ,(select sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_description from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.seq_no = '2') as coll_name_2 ,(select sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_description from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.seq_no = '3') as coll_name_3 ,(select sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_description from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.seq_no = '4') as coll_name_4 ,(select sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_description from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.seq_no = '5') as coll_name_5
,(select sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_loan_request.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.seq_no = '1') as coll_group_name_1 ,(select sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_loan_request.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.seq_no = '2') as coll_group_name_2 ,(select sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_loan_request.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.seq_no = '3') as coll_group_name_3 ,(select sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_loan_request.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.seq_no = '4') as coll_group_name_4 ,(select sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_loan_request.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.seq_no = '5') as coll_group_name_5
from sc_mem_m_membership_registered ,sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group ,sc_mem_m_member_address ,sc_mem_m_member_work_info ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type ,sc_lon_m_loan_request ,sc_cnt_m_coop ,sc_acc_m_ucf_bank
where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.bank_code = sc_acc_m_ucf_bank.bank_id and sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type and sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_member_address.address_type ='0' and sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type = 'ส2' and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = '9500'
/*WHERE*/
